_notes: Twinings application landscape — 100% SAP estate (PCE + BTP + SaaS) plus K2, Talend, Snowflake. All infra based on SAP PCE (Azure) architecture. Users: 1,806 total. Hosting assumed from input.

domains.name: SAP Core ERP
domains.hosting: SAP Private Cloud Edition (Azure West Europe)
domains.forecast: S/4HANA master data backlogs growing — 125 open incidents this month

infra.detail: WP dialog pool at 74% — master data batch jobs contending with user sessions
HANA memory 58% — nominal
Monitoring and alerting healthy
Fiori tile load times elevated — 3.2s vs 1.5s SLA

intel.rootCause: SAP S/4HANA master data processing bottleneck — MM/FI/SD master data correction requests queuing behind scheduled batch jobs. Dialog work process pool at 74% during business hours causing session timeouts for 1,806 users.
causalChain: Master data correction backlog: 847 open items in MDG queue
Batch jobs scheduled in dialog WP class — competing with user sessions
WP pool at 74% — users experiencing session delays and timeouts
K2 approval workflows timing out — downstream impact on procurement approvals
OpenText document routing stalled — purchase orders delayed
intel.recommendation: IMMEDIATE: Move batch MDG jobs to background WP class via SM37. MEDIUM-TERM: Implement ZeroOps MDG queue monitoring with auto-escalation at 200 items. PERMANENT: Scheduled maintenance window for master data batch processing outside business hours.

infra.detail: 847 items in approval queue — avg wait 299 hours
Rule evaluation latency elevated

intel.rootCause: Master Data Governance approval queue severely backed up — 847 items awaiting human review with no automation. Average queue residence time 299 hours.
causalChain: No automated validation — all MDG items require manual reviewer assignment
Reviewer pool of 12 approvers insufficient for 125 incidents/month volume
SLA breach rate 85% — Twinings target is 15%
Downstream: Ariba procurement blocked on supplier master data
Finance close process delayed — GL/COA updates pending
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps can auto-validate standard master data corrections (field mappings, pricing outputs) at 94% accuracy — eliminating manual review for 60%+ of queue items. Human approval retained for GL/COA structural changes.

domains.name: SAP Analytics & Planning
domains.forecast: SAC report generation delays impacting month-end close for finance team

infra.detail: Report generation avg 8.4min — SLA is 2min for standard reports
Live data connection latency 4.2s — query pushdown suboptimal

intel.rootCause: SAP Analytics Cloud report generation degraded — BW/4HANA live connection experiencing high latency due to non-optimised CDS view queries. Finance team month-end reports averaging 8.4 minutes vs 2-minute SLA.
causalChain: BW/4HANA CDS views not utilising HANA query optimisation
SAC live connection triggering full table scans on FI-GL aggregates
Month-end peak: 47 concurrent report users saturating BW query engine
272-hour average MTTR — reports simply wait in queue
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps RCA Engine identifies CDS view optimisation opportunity — auto-generates HANA calculation view alternative. SAC report scheduling can be auto-tiered by priority during peak periods.

infra.detail: Memory 71% — approaching threshold during month-end
Nightly loads completing within window

intel.rootCause: BW/4HANA query performance degraded during peak analytics periods — memory pressure from concurrent SAC and BW queries during month-end reporting window.
causalChain: Month-end: 47 concurrent SAC users + scheduled BW process chains
BW HANA memory at 71% — approaching 80% alert threshold
Query prioritisation not configured — all queries equal priority
intel.recommendation: Configure BW query priority classes — executive dashboards HIGH, ad-hoc queries MEDIUM, batch loads LOW. ZeroOps Capacity Planner can auto-defer low-priority loads during peak.

infra.detail: Supply chain planning scenarios nominal
Material master sync running on schedule

intel.recommendation: Monitor S/4HANA material master sync — any MDG master data delays will propagate to IBP planning accuracy.

domains.name: SAP Procurement & Finance
domains.forecast: Ariba procurement blocked on S/4HANA supplier master data delays

infra.detail: Supplier master sync delayed — S/4HANA MDG backlog upstream
iFlow retrying — master data not yet approved in MDG

intel.rootCause: Ariba procurement workflow blocked — SAP MDG approval backlog preventing supplier master data from syncing to Ariba. 23 purchase orders on hold.
causalChain: MDG supplier master corrections queued 299+ hours
Ariba-S/4HANA iFlow cannot proceed without approved master data
23 POs blocked — procurement team manually tracking via email
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps can auto-prioritise supplier master data items in MDG queue when Ariba PO blocking detected — reducing queue time from 299hrs to <2hrs for priority items.

infra.detail: Document routing nominal
Expense processing nominal

intel.recommendation: OpenText document routing dependent on S/4HANA master data — monitor for downstream impact if MDG backlog worsens.

domains.name: SAP Platform & Identity
domains.forecast: Authorization queue: 80 open access requests averaging 281 hours resolution

infra.detail: 80 open authorization requests — avg 281 hrs in queue
Role provisioning backlog — manual assignment still in use
Azure AD federation healthy — login nominal

intel.rootCause: SAP IAS authorization request backlog — 80 open access requests with no automation for standard role assignments. SoD checks performed manually causing 281-hour average resolution time.
causalChain: No automated SoD checking — every role request manually reviewed
300 authorization requests/month with 12-person manual review team
Fiori catalog assignments require BASIS admin involvement
New starters waiting 11+ days for system access — productivity loss from day 1
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps Change Validator can auto-approve standard Fiori catalog assignments with SoD compliance check. Estimated 70% of authorization requests qualify for auto-approval — reducing queue from 281hrs to <4hrs.

infra.detail: Monitoring and alerting healthy — primary NOC tool
Bidirectional sync with ServiceNow nominal

intel.rootCause: No active issues — Cloud ALM healthy and monitoring effectively.
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps ingests SAP Cloud ALM alerts as primary feed — no configuration change needed. Alert Correlator reduces Cloud ALM noise by estimated 78% based on SAP estate pattern analysis.

domains.name: Integration & Data Platform
domains.forecast: Talend data pipelines to Snowflake stable — no active alerts

infra.detail: Workflow approval timeouts — downstream of S/4HANA MDG delays
Catalog integration nominal

intel.rootCause: K2 workflow approval timeouts — master data approval workflows dependent on S/4HANA MDG responses that are queued 299+ hours. K2 sessions expiring before upstream approvals complete.
causalChain: K2 workflow timeout: 24 hours
MDG approval queue: 299 hours average
K2 workflows timing out and requiring manual restart
61 work-instruction tickets open at 376-hour average resolution
intel.recommendation: ZeroOps can detect K2 timeout patterns and auto-restart workflows once upstream MDG approval completes — reducing the manual restart overhead for service desk team.

infra.detail: ETL pipelines nominal — SAP to Snowflake sync on schedule

intel.recommendation: Monitor Talend pipelines for SAP master data quality issues — MDG data errors will propagate to Snowflake analytics.

infra.detail: Analytics queries nominal — all warehouses active

intel.recommendation: Snowflake data quality depends on SAP master data accuracy — MDG backlogs will impact analytics data freshness within 48 hours.

domains.forecast: All collaboration services healthy — M365 nominal

infra.detail: Teams, Exchange, SharePoint all nominal
SSO federation to SAP IAS healthy

intel.recommendation: Monitor Azure AD federation to SAP IAS — any Entra conditional access changes could impact SAP SSO for all 1,806 users.

infra.detail: ITSM nominal — 493 active incidents managed
Bidirectional alert sync active

intel.recommendation: ZeroOps integrates with ServiceNow as primary ticket system — all auto-resolutions and HiTL approvals reflected in ServiceNow automatically. Zero manual logging.
